category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Ghana) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Ghana Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入加纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入迦納：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Ghana market requirements: Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) conformity assessment and destination inspection, GS/IEC 62133 cell safety, National Communications Authority (NCA) approval for wireless, Energy Commission appliance labelling, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与加纳市场要求对照：加纳标准局（GSA）合格评定与到岸检验、GS/IEC 62133电芯安全、国家通信管理局（NCA）无线核准、能源委员会电器能效标签、UN 38.3运输及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與迦納市場要求對照：迦納標準局（GSA）合格評定與到岸檢驗、GS/IEC 62133電芯安全、國家通訊管理局（NCA）無線核准、能源委員會電器能效標籤、UN 38.3運輸及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters shipping to Ghana should plan for Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) conformity assessment and destination inspection where the product is in scope, safety evidence aligned to GS/IEC 62133, National Communications Authority (NCA) type approval for any wireless function, UN 38.3 transport documentation, and a registered in-country importer — none of which are automatically satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 向加纳出口锂电池及移动电源的中国出口商，应针对适用情形规划加纳标准局（GSA）合格评定与到岸检验、与GS/IEC 62133一致的安全证据、任何无线功能的国家通信管理局（NCA）型号核准、UN 38.3运输文件，以及一名注册本地进口商——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证自动替代。
answer_first.zht: 向迦納出口鋰電池及行動電源的中國出口商，應針對適用情形規劃迦納標準局（GSA）合格評定與到岸檢驗、與GS/IEC 62133一致的安全證據、任何無線功能的國家通訊管理局（NCA）型號核准、UN 38.3運輸文件，以及一名註冊本地進口商——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證自動替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred.
